title: Doesn't This Count as Being Burned to Death?│這不算燒死嗎？
description: Animals killed by Magma Blocks or Campfires will also drop cooked meat.│被岩漿塊或營火燒死的動物也會掉落熟肉。
body:
# Function│功能
This data pack causes some mobs to drop cooked items when killed by damage tag with ```#is_fire```.│此資料包讓部分生物在被屬於```#is_fire```標籤的傷害擊殺時，掉落的物品會被烤過。

Since damage from campfires and Magma blocks to mobs is considered ```#is_fire``` damage, mobs killed by campfires and Magma blocks will drop cooked meat.│由於營火與岩漿塊對生物造成的傷害屬於```#is_fire```標籤內的傷害，因此被營火與岩漿塊所造成的傷害擊殺時會掉落熟肉。
# Support│支援
This data pack also supports [Goat Drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/goat-drops) and [Ravager Drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ravager-drops), where Goats and Ravagers will drop cooked items when killed by damage tagged with ```#is_fire```; Additionally, the data pack is also compatible with [Bone Drop](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bone-drop).│該資料包也支援[山羊掉落物](https://modrinth.com/datapack/goat-drops)和[劫掠獸掉落物](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ravager-drops)，山羊和劫掠獸在被屬於```#is_fire```標籤的傷害擊殺時，也會掉落烤過的物品；另外，該資料包也有兼容[骨頭掉落](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bone-drop)。

### Enter the following two commands in order to ensure that the function of the data package can take effect correctly│依序輸入以下兩條指令以確保該資料包的功能能正確生效

```/datapack disable "file/doesn't_this_count_as_being_burned_to_death_1.0.1+1.21.5"```

```/datapack enable "file/doesn't_this_count_as_being_burned_to_death_1.0.1+1.21.5" last```
